titleStmt.title: SII 41.37: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 37. (A.R. No. 36 of 1905.) Perumukkal, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the slab set up in a field near the village at Perumukkal.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Vēngaṭapathirāyar Śaka 1513, Virodhi, Makara, Purva 10, Monday, Uttirāḍam (irregular) = 1589 A.D.

summary.p: Gift of some garden land with well and tank by the watchman (kāval) Vēṅkaṭappa-nāyaka for the merit of Timmakkāḷ of the ‘palace’ (araimaṉaiyār) at the order of Bommu-nāyaka, son of Nagamanāyaka. Koṇḍama-nāyaka, son of Krishṇappa-nāyaka is also mentioned. Trees like mango, areca, coconut, lemon, berry and other crops were permitted to be cultivated in the garden.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṉma
kāmaṇṭalecu
raveṅkaṭapati te
vamakārāyar piṟitivi
rācciyam paṇṇi Aru
ḷāniṉṟakālattu cakāṟta
m 100 5 10 13ṉmēl
cellāniṉṟa virōtivaruṣam makara
nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu
tecamiyum comavāramum pe
ṟṟa Uttirāṭattuṉāḷperumu
kkil tirumalaimelāḷuṭai
yanampirāṉāṟkutiruppaṇi
ttoṭṭamākaperumukki
lērikiḻkiḻṉattam
toṭṭattukkiṇaṟum kiṇaṟ
ṟukkukārpokattu
Aṟutikkutekkupiṭārikuḷattu
kku keḷakkutirai
toṭṭattukkuvaṭakku
yārkuṭaimāṉiyat
tukku kkuiṉṉāṉ
kellaiyumkiṇaṟumuṉ
ṟumuḷpaṭakiṣṇappaṉā
yakkaraiyyaṉkumāra
rkoṇṭamaṉāyakarai
yyaṉpiṟatāpattiṉā
leṉākamaṉāyakkaraiy
yaṉkumārarpommuṉā
yakkaraiyyaṉuttara
viṉppaṭikkukāvalve
ṅkaṭappaṉāyakkara
yyaṉaraimaṉaiyā
rtimmakkāḷ Ammaṉu
kkuppuṇṇiyamāka kā
valveṅkaṭappaṉā
yakkarayyaṉviṭṭata
ṉmamitilemāmara
mpalāmaramteṉṉa
maramkamukumaramne
llimaramṉāṟattai
Elimpaccaimañ
caḷiñcivāḻai
piṉṉaiyumveṇ
ṭumpayirumpayiṟce
ytutōṭattileni
ṟkiṟanimantāḷukkucivi
tamtaḷḷimaṟṟatel
lām

tiruppaṇikkunaṭatta
kkaṭaivarkaḷākavum
Intataṉmattukkuyā
toruvar Akutampaṇṇi
ṉālumkeṅkaikkaraiyi
lkārāmpacuvaikkoṉṟato
ṣattilum pirāmaṇaṉait taṉ
mātā pitāvaik ko
ṉṟa toṣattilum poka
kkaṭaivarkaḷākavum§ cuvatat
tāt tivikuṇam puṇṇiyam
parattāṉupālanam paratat
tāpa hāreṇa cutattā ni
ṣpalam pavetu§
Digital edition of SII 41.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
